title: Banking & Financial Services
subtitle: Compliant Verification for SA Banks
description: Meet FICA, FAIS, NCA, and SARB requirements with automated customer and employee verification. VeriGate helps South African banks, insurers, and asset managers streamline KYC, AML screening, and background checks while reducing fraud losses.

challenges.title: Complex Regulatory Landscape
challenges.description: South African banks must comply with FICA, FAIS, the Banks Act, NCA, and SARB directives simultaneously, with FIC penalties reaching R50 million.
challenges.impact: High compliance costs and regulatory risk

challenges.title: Manual KYC Processes
challenges.description: Many SA banks still rely on manual document collection and verification, leading to slow onboarding and poor customer experience.
challenges.impact: Customer drop-off rates exceeding 40%

challenges.title: Fraud & Financial Crime
challenges.description: South African banks face increasing identity fraud, synthetic identities, SIM swap attacks, and money laundering through compromised accounts.
challenges.impact: R4.6 billion annual fraud losses in SA banking

challenges.title: Digital Transformation Pressure
challenges.description: Customers expect fully digital account opening and services, requiring banks to digitise KYC without compromising compliance or security.
challenges.impact: 40% of customers switch banks due to poor digital experience

solutions.title: Automated KYC Onboarding
solutions.description: Digital customer onboarding with real-time FICA compliance
features: DHA identity verification in real time
Automated FICA CDD and EDD workflows
Sanctions, PEP, and adverse media screening

solutions.title: AML Screening Platform
solutions.description: Continuous sanctions and transaction monitoring for FICA compliance
features: PEP and adverse media ongoing monitoring
Automated Section 29 STR preparation for FIC

solutions.title: Employee Background Screening
solutions.description: Comprehensive employee vetting for financial services staff

regulations.name: FICA
regulations.description: Financial Intelligence Centre Act -- Customer due diligence, record keeping, and suspicious transaction reporting for accountable institutions.

regulations.name: Banks Act
regulations.description: Governs the conduct and regulation of banks in South Africa, including capital adequacy, risk management, and corporate governance.

regulations.name: SARB Directives
regulations.description: South African Reserve Bank prudential requirements, capital adequacy standards, and AML/CFT supervisory expectations.

regulations.name: NCA
regulations.description: National Credit Act -- Governs credit granting, affordability assessments, and consumer credit information for lending activities.

useCases.description: Enable fully digital bank account opening with compliant KYC verification

challenges.title: Evolving FSCA Regulation

challenges.title: FATF Travel Rule Compliance

regulations.description: Product safety, fair trading, return policies, and consumer rights for goods sold through online marketplaces.

regulations.name: POPIA
regulations.description: Protection of Personal Information Act -- Data protection for buyer, seller, and transaction data processed by the platform.

regulations.name: Tax Administration Act
regulations.description: SARS reporting obligations for marketplace operators facilitating taxable transactions above prescribed thresholds.

title: Social Networks & Dating
subtitle: Identity Verification for SA Social Platforms
description: Protect users on South African social and dating platforms with age verification, identity confirmation, and account authenticity checks. VeriGate helps comply with POPIA minor protections, the Films and Publications Act, and the Cybercrimes Act.

challenges.title: Underage User Protection
challenges.description: POPIA imposes strict requirements for processing children's personal information, requiring verifiable parental consent for users under 18.
challenges.impact: POPIA penalties up to R10M and reputational harm

challenges.title: Fake Accounts & Impersonation
challenges.description: Fake profiles, bot accounts, and identity impersonation undermine platform trust, enable scams, and create hostile environments for SA users.
challenges.impact: User trust erosion and platform abuse

challenges.title: Online Harassment & Safety
challenges.description: Anonymity enables harassment, hate speech, and cyberbullying. The Cybercrimes Act requires platforms to assist law enforcement in identifying perpetrators.
challenges.impact: Legal liability and user safety risk

challenges.title: Content Regulation Compliance
challenges.description: The Films and Publications Act requires platforms to restrict access to age-inappropriate content and prevent distribution of prohibited material.
challenges.impact: Criminal prosecution and platform blocking

solutions.title: Age Verification Gateway
solutions.description: POPIA-compliant age verification for social platform registration

solutions.title: Identity Verification Badges
solutions.description: Verified identity badges for authentic accounts on the platform
features: DHA identity verification for badge assignment
Verified account badges displayed on profiles

solutions.title: Account Authenticity Engine
solutions.description: Multi-signal account scoring to detect and remove fake profiles and bots
features: Behavioural pattern analysis for bot detection

regulations.name: Films & Publications Act
regulations.description: Regulates access to age-restricted content and requires platforms to prevent minors from accessing harmful material.

regulations.name: POPIA
regulations.description: Protection of Personal Information Act -- Special conditions for processing children's personal information with verifiable consent.

regulations.name: Cybercrimes Act
regulations.description: Criminalises cyber fraud, identity theft, and online harassment. Platforms must assist law enforcement on court order.

regulations.name: ECT Act
regulations.description: Electronic Communications and Transactions Act -- Platform operator obligations and liability for user-generated content.

Compliance audit trail for Information Regulator

Enhanced trust signals for content creators
